title: alchemilla fissa subsp. glabra
intro: Alchemilla fissa subsp. glabra, also known as the alpine lady's mantle, is a plant species belonging to the Alchemilla genus, characterized by its smooth, hairless leaves and stems. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating wounds, inflammation, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and astringent properties. The health benefits of Alchemilla fissa subsp. glabra include reducing swelling, promoting skin health, and soothing irritated skin, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies. Alchemilla fissa subsp. glabra can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for various ways to harness its medicinal properties.
